events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. The pre-entry test shows O2 (20.9%), H2S (1 ppm), and CO (5 ppm) all within acceptable limits, but **LEL at 16%** exceeds the standard 10% LEL entry threshold — a flammable-atmosphere hazard. Entry should not be authorized until the space is ventilated and re-tested.
